name: LootLabs
description: Monetise your content with link locking. Earn revenue by gating downloads or Discord invites behind short ad interactions.

name: Tebex Creator
description: Monetise your game server with a built-in storefront. Sell ranks, items, and perks — integrates with Minecraft, Rust, FiveM, and more.

name: Gumroad
description: Sell digital products directly to your audience. No monthly fee — Gumroad takes a flat cut per sale. Great for creators selling ebooks, courses, and templates.

name: Notion
description: All-in-one workspace for notes, wikis, databases, and project management. Teams use it as their company OS. Generous free tier.

name: Lemon Squeezy
description: Sell SaaS subscriptions and digital products. Handles VAT, merchant of record, affiliate management, and licensing out of the box.

name: Canva
description: Drag-and-drop design tool for non-designers. Social posts, presentations, logos, and print-ready marketing materials with 1M+ templates.

name: Calendly
description: Eliminate scheduling back-and-forth. Share a link and let clients or teammates pick a time that works — automatically blocks your calendar.

name: Mailchimp
description: Email marketing platform trusted by millions. Drag-and-drop email builder, audience segmentation, automations, and analytics.

name: Slack
description: Team messaging and collaboration hub. Channels, threads, file sharing, and thousands of app integrations.

name: Trello
description: Visual kanban board for tracking tasks and projects. Drag cards across columns to manage your workflow.

name: HubSpot
description: Free CRM with marketing, sales, and support tools. Track leads, manage contacts, and automate emails.

name: Loom
description: Record and share quick video messages instead of meetings. Screen + camera capture, instant shareable link.

name: HubSpot CRM
description: Free CRM for managing contacts, deals, and pipelines. Track leads, log emails, and automate follow-ups at no cost.

name: Airtable
description: Spreadsheet-database hybrid. Build databases, trackers, and CRMs with a familiar grid interface plus automations.

name: Docusign
description: The standard for electronic signatures. Send, sign, and manage contracts and agreements from anywhere.

name: Typeform
description: Conversational forms and surveys that feel like a chat. Higher completion rates than traditional form builders.

name: Zapier
description: Connect thousands of apps without code. Automate repetitive tasks between Gmail, Slack, Sheets, and 6000+ other tools.

name: Stripe
description: The developer-friendly payments platform powering millions of businesses. Accept cards, subscriptions, and invoicing.

name: Asana
description: Work management platform for teams to track projects, tasks, and goals. Timeline, board, and list views included.

name: Monday.com
description: Colourful, flexible work OS for managing any kind of workflow. Highly visual boards with automation and integrations.
